▶ #102 mlx-community/Qwen3.6-27B-4bit @ stop-long-phrase 1188 tokens · 20.5 tok/s

API variant: stop-long-phrase temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop: In conclusion
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 57.91s prompt_tok: 41 comp_tok: 1188 tok/s: 20.5
🎯 Test Intent
Tests stop on a long multi-word phrase. Feature: stop with multi-token string.
Expected: essay contains paragraphs 1-2 about renewable energy, stops before
"In conclusion" appears. Tests buffer-based stop detection across token boundaries.
PROMPT Write a 3-paragraph essay about renewable energy. Start the last paragraph with "In conclusion".

▶ #108 mlx-community/Qwen3.6-27B-4bit @ stop-immediate 1165 tokens · 18.1 tok/s

API variant: stop-immediate temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop: The, I, A
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 64.25s prompt_tok: 27 comp_tok: 1165 tok/s: 18.1
🎯 Test Intent
Tests immediate stop (first token matches). Feature: stop on common first tokens.
Expected: empty or near-empty output. The model's first token is likely "The", "I",
or "A" — all are in the stop list. finish_reason="stop", completion_tokens near 0.
PROMPT Explain what gravity is.

▶ #109 mlx-community/Qwen3.6-27B-4bit @ stop-special-chars 562 tokens · 18.0 tok/s

API variant: stop-special-chars baseline: yes temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop: **
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 31.17s prompt_tok: 38 comp_tok: 562 tok/s: 18.0
🎯 Test Intent
Tests stop on markdown special characters. Feature: stop with "**".
Expected: output stops at first "**" bold marker. Only partial text before the first
bold-formatted word. Tests that special regex characters in stop are handled correctly.
PROMPT Name three primary colors and explain why they matter in design. Answer concisely.

▶ #115 mlx-community/Qwen3.6-27B-4bit @ stop-four-max 556 tokens · 18.0 tok/s

API variant: stop-four-max baseline: yes temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 stop: 3., three, Third, III
Perf finish: stop load: 2.0s gen: 30.86s prompt_tok: 38 comp_tok: 556 tok/s: 18.0
🎯 Test Intent
Tests maximum 4 stop sequences (OpenAI spec limit). Feature: stop with 4 entries.
Expected: output stops at whichever of "3.", "three", "Third", "III" appears first.
Prompt asks for mixed digit/word numbering to give multiple stop strings a chance.
PROMPT Name three primary colors and explain why they matter in design. Answer concisely.

finish_reason="stop". Tests that escape sequences in stop are handled correctly.

PROMPT Name three primary colors and explain why they matter in design. Answer concisely.

Expected: exactly 3 lines, each with one word: "apple", "banana", "cherry".
No numbering, no punctuation, no extra text. Any deviation = instruction following failure.
PROMPT Output EXACTLY 3 lines. Each line must contain exactly one word. The words must be: apple, banana, cherry. No other text, no numbering, no punctuation.

NOT a serialized string. finish_reason="tool_calls". Validates array params survive serialization.
PROMPT tools: [{"type":"function","function":{"name":"todowrite","description":"Write a list of todo items","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"todos":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"List of todo items to create"}},"required":["todos"]}}}]
